assertion_results.text: Output must score at least three areas at 4/5 or higher
assertion_results.evidence: Output uses no numerical scoring. No area score table present.

assertion_results.text: Output must not recommend tooling the team already has (e.g. Datadog, feature flags, SLOs)
assertion_results.evidence: Datadog and feature flags referenced only as existing assets. No new tooling recommended anywhere in the output.

assertion_results.text: Output must give at least one non-trivial medium- or long-term recommendation
assertion_results.evidence: 'auditing whether runbooks are actually being kept current or are drifting' and 'Documentation of why the norms exist (not just what they are) will help as the team grows' — substantive longer-term items.

assertion_results.text: Output must acknowledge the low incident rate of 0.1 P1/month
assertion_results.evidence: '0.1 P1 per month and 12-minute MTTR are excellent.' Explicitly cites the metric verbatim from the user's input.

assertion_results.text: Output must include at least one improvement item
assertion_results.evidence: 'auditing whether runbooks are actually being kept current', 'Documentation of why the norms exist', Supabase scaling as a forward-looking concern.
